parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ task: 'Go to ' + $('Normalize Input').first().json.siteUrl + ', open browser console, check for JavaScript errors. Report any errors found. If no errors, report "No console errors found."', save_browser_data: true }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ task: 'Go to ' + $('Normalize Input').first().json.siteUrl + '/signup, try to create an account with email test_' + Date.now() + '@test.com and password Test123456!. Report whether signup succeeds or fails and any error messages seen.', save_browser_data: true }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'App test report for ' + $json.businessName + ' (' + $json.today + ')', content: Buffer.from($json.report).toString('base64') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'App Tester', message: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.failed > 0 ? $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.businessName + ' app test: ' + $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.failed + ' failures found, issues created. Health score: ' + $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.healthScore + '/100' : $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.businessName + ' app test: ALL PASS (score: ' + $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.healthScore + '/100)', severity: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.failed > 0 ? 'warning' : 'info', businessId: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.businessId, requiresResponse: false }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ last_test_date: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.today, last_test_score: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.healthScore }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ agent: 'App Tester', message: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.businessName + ' app test: ALL PASS (score: ' + $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.healthScore + '/100)', severity: 'info', businessId: $('Aggregate All Results').first().json.businessId, requiresResponse: false }) }}
